title: Partner with Ericsson for AI co-innovation initiatives
evidence: SAP and Ericsson are collaborating on AI co-innovation initiatives.

title: Develop new AI-based products or services
evidence: Customers require transparency in how support is delivered, predictable outcomes from their investments, and a simpler way to adopt innovation across their landscapes.

title: Form partnerships with other companies
evidence: The company is seeking ongoing guidance, measurable outcomes, and a partner that supports the transformation journey at every stage.
validation_notes: This recommendation was too vague in its evidence to justify forming partnerships with other companies.
